title: Cobblemon x Megami Tensei
description: Demons from the Megami Tensei series added into Cobbelmon.
body:
![everyone1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb5648e80028284557256d04661b98cfdee6219a.png)

 Planned for the future:
-     Thor, Loki, Odin, Poltergeist, Alice, Doppelgänger, Pazuzu, Angel, Archangel, Principality and more...

Check out the [Wiki](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1vT_XJ2z5rdH4ohgApP9xL7BSzEtnVYNesmxR-5wuQRk/edit?usp=sharing) for more information on current Demons/ Fakemons.

### Usage:
- Allowed on servers.
- Allowed in any form of media creation.
- Allowed in modpacks.
